'''nazhaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:enantioenrichment|enantioenrichment]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:enantioenrichment|enantioenrichment]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nazhaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:næzhæbæth|næzhæbæth]] || [[word:næzhæbæj|næzhæbæj]] || [[word:næzhæbæsh|næzhæbæsh]] || [[word:næzhæbæ|næzhæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:nazhazhabath|nazhazhabath]] || [[word:nazhazhabaj|nazhazhabaj]] || [[word:nazhazhabash|nazhazhabash]] || [[word:nazhazhaba|nazhazhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nazhabath|nazhabath]] || [[word:nazhabaj|nazhabaj]] || [[word:nazhabash|nazhabash]] || [[word:nazhaba|nazhaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nazhafbath|nazhafbath]] || [[word:nazhafbaj|nazhafbaj]] || [[word:nazhafbash|nazhafbash]] || [[word:nazhafbaf|nazhafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nazhabatha|nazhabatha]] || [[word:nazhabaja|nazhabaja]] || [[word:nazhabasha|nazhabasha]] || [[word:nazhabaka|nazhabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nazhabath|nazhabath]] || [[word:nazhabaj|nazhabaj]] || [[word:nazhabash|nazhabash]] || [[word:nazhaba|nazhaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nazhabathal|nazhabathal]] || [[word:nazhabajal|nazhabajal]] || [[word:nazhabashal|nazhabashal]] || [[word:nazhabakal|nazhabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nazhabathatha|nazhabathatha]] || [[word:nazhabajaja|nazhabajaja]] || [[word:nazhabashasha|nazhabashasha]] || [[word:nazhabaka|nazhabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nazhabathan|nazhabathan]] || [[word:nazhabajan|nazhabajan]] || [[word:nazhabashan|nazhabashan]] || [[word:nazhabakan|nazhabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nazhabathaoro|nazhabathaoro]] || [[word:nazhabajaoro|nazhabajaoro]] || [[word:nazhabashaoro|nazhabashaoro]] || [[word:nazhabakaoro|nazhabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
